title: Modern Splash
description: New Mojang logo and loading screen in 1.12
body:
Modern Splash is a 1.12.2 & 1.7.10 mod changes loading screen to high version style, including a new configurable dark mode.

The colour combination of default dark mode is come from [Default Dark Mode](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/default-dark-mode) resource pack.

Some old version elements(e.g. Forge anvil) are disabled by default, but can be re-enabled in config.

Config file is located at *config/splash.properties*

You may want to remove existed config/splash.properties to clear old colour settings when installing.
 
**Incompatible with all loading screen mods.**

**1.12.2 version requires [Cleanroom](https://github.com/CleanroomMC/Cleanroom)**.

**1.7.10 version requires [UniMixins](https://modrinth.com/mod/unimixins)**.
